name: Ganyu, Shenhe, and Xianyun | Liyue Lovers
description:
The Liyue hottie trio have become your wives, and they're very competitive over who does it the best...

Warnings: Oyakodon (is anyone even really put off by that though)

REMADE BOT!!! I caught multiple really bad errors in the personality and intro message in the last version of it so im re-releasing it, sorry for clogging up your following feed or anything. Just a good reminder to always triple quadruple proofread especially for bot coding 😭
